teachingPoint: T215 WebhookIngestionHandler MUST use crypto.timingSafeEqual() for HMAC signature verification (CF-211). String === comparison on HMAC digests leaks response timing that enables replay enumeration attacks. On invalid HMAC the handler MUST return HTTP 200 with no event emitted — returning 401 or 403 gives attackers an oracle confirming the signature was inspected. This is a MACHINE constraint — never configurable.
positiveExample: T215 retrieves the signing secret via F427, computes the HMAC-SHA256 digest, then calls crypto.timingSafeEqual(Buffer.from(expectedSig, 'hex'), Buffer.from(actualSig, 'hex')). On false it returns HTTP 200 immediately with no WebhookEventIngested emitted and no error logged to the caller.
negativeExample: T215 does if (expectedSig === actualSig) — string equality leaks timing information; or T215 returns HTTP 401 on HMAC mismatch — gives attackers a timing oracle to enumerate valid signatures via response code difference.
discriminatingConstraint: crypto.timingSafeEqual() required; HTTP 200 with no event on invalid — string === or 401/403 response on HMAC failure = score-0.
keywords: HMAC timingSafeEqual webhook ingestion replay attack CF-211 T215 constant time comparison http 200 no event invalid signature

teachingPoint: T214 EtlSyncSagaHandler and T216 BackfillCoordinator MUST follow the EP-4 durable saga cycle order: rate_check → poll_page → land_raw → commit_cursor. Committing the cursor before landing raw causes data loss on crash recovery. Polling before the rate check wastes already-consumed quota. The cursor MUST be validated monotonically increasing via ICursorCheckpointService (CF-193) at commit step — non-monotonic cursor indicates duplicate ingestion and must be rejected.
positiveExample: T214: F430.checkRateLimit() at ORDER 1 → pollPage() at ORDER 2 → storeDocument(rawRecord, append-only) at ORDER 3 → cursorCheckpoint.commitIfMonotonic(cursor) at ORDER 4. SyncJobFailed includes lastCursorPosition for crash recovery.
negativeExample: T214 commits cursor at ORDER 2 before landing raw at ORDER 3 — crash between ORDER 2 and 3 causes data loss because the engine believes the page was already processed. Or T214 polls first and rate-checks after — quota is consumed before the guard fires.
discriminatingConstraint: rate_check ORDER 1, poll ORDER 2, land_raw ORDER 3, commit_cursor ORDER 4 — any reorder = score-0.
keywords: EP-4 durable saga rate_check poll_page land_raw commit_cursor cursor monotonic CF-193 ICursorCheckpointService T214 T216 sync backfill crash recovery

teachingPoint: T219 DimensionalModelBuilder MUST use version-only SCD-2 strategy (DR-62). Direct UPDATE on dimension records is prohibited — it destroys the historical audit trail. The close_old_version + open_new_version operations MUST be atomic in a single transaction. If close succeeds but open fails, orphaned dim records corrupt the dimension history. effectiveFrom and effectiveTo MUST be set on all version records.
positiveExample: T219: (1) load existing open version → (2) atomic batch: storeDocument(closeOld, {effectiveTo: now}) + storeDocument(openNew, {effectiveFrom: now}) → (3) emit DimensionVersionCreated after atomic commit. Both stores in one transaction.
negativeExample: T219 calls db.updateDocument({id: dimId, ...newFields}) — destroys previous historical state; or closes old and opens new in separate transactions — crash between the two creates an orphaned dim record with no successor.
discriminatingConstraint: close_old + open_new atomic in one transaction — any direct UPDATE or non-atomic pair = score-0.
keywords: SCD-2 version-only dimensional model builder close old open new atomic effectiveFrom effectiveTo T219 DR-62 no UPDATE orphaned dim record

teachingPoint: T220 MartKpiBuilder MUST classify ALL fields via IPiiClassificationService (F462) BEFORE writing to mart zone (DR-63). Mart data is aggregated cross-entity data — unmasked PII in the mart is the highest-risk data surface. If piiFieldsDetected > 0 without masking the mart write MUST be blocked entirely. PiiClassificationCompleted MUST be emitted before MartRefreshed. RLS (F463) applied to all mart query results.
positiveExample: T220: F462.classify(allKpiFields) at ORDER 1 → if piiFieldsDetected > 0 && !masked return DataProcessResult.failure('PII_UNMASKED_IN_MART') → computeKpis → storeDocument(mart) → emit PiiClassificationCompleted → emit MartRefreshed with piiGateApplied: true.
negativeExample: T220 calls F462.classify() after mart write — PII fields already persisted before classification fires. Or T220 skips F462 for numeric-only KPIs assuming they cannot contain PII — aggregated counts can indirectly re-identify individuals.
discriminatingConstraint: F462.classify() at ORDER 1 before any mart write — any skip or post-write classification = score-0.
keywords: PII gate mart write F462 IPiiClassificationService piiFieldsDetected block T220 MartKpiBuilder DR-63 F463 RLS PiiClassificationCompleted MartRefreshed order

teachingPoint: T221 IdentityJoinResolver MUST validate that ALL join inputs carry tenantId before any identity resolution (CF-204). A cross-tenant join — inputs from different tenants in the same resolution request — MUST be rejected with CrossTenantJoinAttempted error at ORDER 1 before any DB access. RLS (F463) applied to results after resolution. IdentityJoinCompleted MUST include crossTenantGuardPassed: true.
positiveExample: T221: validateCrossTenantJoinInputs() at ORDER 1 verifies all inputs share the same tenantId from AsyncLocalStorage → cross-tenant mismatch returns failure immediately → resolve identities → F463.filter() → emit IdentityJoinCompleted with crossTenantGuardPassed: true.
negativeExample: T221 validates tenantId on the primary input only, not on all join partners — a compromised tenant injects inputs from a second tenant into the join; the guard passes for the primary while the secondary leaks cross-tenant data.
discriminatingConstraint: cross-tenant guard on ALL inputs at ORDER 1 — any join without tenantId on every input = score-0.
keywords: cross tenant join guard T221 IdentityJoinResolver CF-204 tenantId ALL inputs validation F463 RLS crossTenantGuardPassed IdentityJoinCompleted

teachingPoint: T223 ReverseEtlPushHandler MUST push to external SaaS destinations via QUEUE_FABRIC exclusively — no direct HTTP (DR-64). Rate limit check via F430 MUST run BEFORE the push lock check. On throttle, RateLimitExhausted MUST be emitted — never silently dropped. ReverseETLPushed MUST include transport: 'queue_fabric' to prove the fabric path was used.
positiveExample: T223: F430.checkRateLimit() → checkPushLock() → queue.enqueue(pushJob) → storeDocument(pushRecord) → emit ReverseETLPushed with transport: 'queue_fabric'. On throttle emit RateLimitExhausted before returning failure.
negativeExample: T223 calls fetch() or axios.post() directly to the SaaS API endpoint — bypasses queue fabric transport. Or T223 silently returns DataProcessResult.success() on rate limit without emitting RateLimitExhausted.
discriminatingConstraint: queue.enqueue() only for SaaS push, RateLimitExhausted on throttle — direct HTTP or silent drop = score-0.
keywords: reverse ETL queue fabric only no direct HTTP T223 ReverseEtlPushHandler DR-64 F430 rate limit RateLimitExhausted transport queue_fabric push lock
HMAC timingSafeEqual webhook security CF-211 T215 constant time comparison replay oracle 200 no event
teachingPoint: T215 WebhookIngestionHandler: HMAC verification is a MACHINE security gate. timingSafeEqual is mandatory (CF-211). Invalid HMAC returns HTTP 200 with no event — never 401/403.
ironRules: HMAC verify: crypto.timingSafeEqual(Buffer.from(expected,'hex'), Buffer.from(actual,'hex'))
On invalid HMAC: return HTTP 200 immediately, no WebhookEventIngested emitted
NEVER use === for HMAC comparison
NEVER return 401/403 on HMAC failure — gives replay oracle
Idempotency check via idempotencyKey BEFORE raw zone write (ORDER 2)
Raw zone append-only after HMAC pass (CF-192)

keywords: EP-4 saga cursor monotonic CF-193 ICursorCheckpointService T214 T216 rate_check poll_page land_raw commit_cursor quarantine append-only
teachingPoint: T214/T216 EP-4 saga: rate_check(1) → poll_page(2) → land_raw append-only(3) → commit_cursor monotonic(4). Cursor commit ONLY after successful land_raw. Non-monotonic cursor rejected.
ironRules: ORDER 1: F430.checkRateLimit() — before any external call
ORDER 2: pollPage() via ICredentialVaultService (F427) resolved credentials
ORDER 3: storeDocument(rawRecord) — append-only, no UPDATE/DELETE on raw zone (CF-192)
ORDER 4: cursorCheckpoint.commitIfMonotonic(newCursor) via ICursorCheckpointService (CF-193)
On normalization error: quarantine record, emit RecordQuarantined — never silent drop
SyncJobFailed / BackfillFailed MUST include lastCursorPosition for crash recovery

keywords: SCD-2 version-only atomic close old open new effectiveFrom effectiveTo T219 DimensionalModelBuilder DR-62 no UPDATE orphaned
teachingPoint: T219 DimensionalModelBuilder: SCD-2 version-only (DR-62). close_old + open_new MUST be atomic. Direct UPDATE prohibited. effectiveFrom/effectiveTo mandatory on all version records.
ironRules: SCD-2 strategy: version-only — direct UPDATE on dim records PROHIBITED (DR-62)
close_old_version + open_new_version MUST be in a single atomic transaction
orphaned dim records (old open with no successor) PROHIBITED
effectiveFrom set on new version, effectiveTo set on closed version
Fact records: append-only (FactAppended event)
DimensionVersionCreated emitted AFTER atomic commit

keywords: PII gate F462 IPiiClassificationService mart write T220 MartKpiBuilder DR-63 F463 RLS block piiFieldsDetected PiiClassificationCompleted before MartRefreshed
teachingPoint: T220 MartKpiBuilder: F462.classify() at ORDER 1 before mart write (DR-63). Block if piiFieldsDetected > 0 without masking. PiiClassificationCompleted before MartRefreshed. F463 RLS on results.
ironRules: ORDER 1: F462.classify(allFields) — PLATFORM-ONLY, before any mart write
If piiFieldsDetected > 0 && !masked: return DataProcessResult.failure('PII_UNMASKED_IN_MART')
Emit PiiClassificationCompleted BEFORE MartRefreshed
MartRefreshed MUST include piiGateApplied: true
F463.applyRls() on all mart query results
No skipPiiMasking flag — tenants cannot disable this gate
